visionText: Our vision is to be a beacon of poetic expression and cultural enlightenment, celebrated not only across India but around the world. We aspire to transform Kavi Sammelan from a traditional literary gathering into a global platform that bridges cultural divides and fosters a universal appreciation for the beauty and depth of Indian poetry.
missionText: At OG Recreations, our mission is to uphold and celebrate the rich traditions of Indian poetry through the organization of premier Kavi Sammelan events. We are dedicated to cultivating a deeper appreciation of poetry across generations and demographics, fostering an environment where the art of verse can flourish.
